Name: Activity Items
Description: Hero activity row items. Each entry: "<emoji>|<text>". e.g. "⚡|Fresh sprouts in 2–3 days"

Name: Benefits Items
Description: Hero "Why this kit" 2x2 benefits. Each entry: "<emoji>|<label>". e.g. "🌱|Fresh sprouts in 2–3 days"

Name: Hero Trust Strip
Description: Short trust items shown below the ATC button. e.g. Free Shipping / FSSAI Licensed

Name: Jar Capacity
Description: Capacity label for the variant cards. "700ml" or "1000ml"

Name: Help Note
Description: Helper text shown beside the Jar Size Chart link in the variant block

Name: Jar Size Chart Image
Description: Image displayed inside the Jar Size Chart modal

Name: Companion Size Product
Description: The other capacity (700ml ↔ 1L) — drives the cross-capacity link below the variant block

Name: Cross-sell Products
Description: Up to 3 products shown in the Pair It With section

Name: Hero Benefits Icons
Description: Custom SVG / image icons for the "Why this kit" 2x2 grid in the hero. List in the same order as benefits_items. Overrides the emoji prefix.

Name: Benefits Icons
Description: Custom SVG / image icons for the "Quick Benefits" 3-card section. List in the same order as benefit blocks.

Name: Comparison Left Image
Description: Image for the LEFT side of the comparison section (cloth method). Overrides the section setting.

Name: Comparison Right Image
Description: Image for the RIGHT side of the comparison section (sprout maker). Overrides the section setting.

Name: Box Image
Description: Image for the What's in the Box section. Overrides the section setting.

Name: How to Make Video
Description: Demo video for the How to Make section. Overrides the section setting.

Name: Featured Reviews
Description: List of kit_review metaobjects shown in the UGC Reviews section. Overrides the manual review blocks.

Name: Best For
Description: Per-variant audience copy under the BEST FOR label inside each pack card

Name: Variant Tag
Description: Optional badge above each variant card. e.g. TOP SELLER, BEST VALUE
